privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated Space Situational Awareness bulletin for a fictitious future date (01 May 2025). The NORAD ID 59001 actually belongs to a Starlink satellite, not a CZ-5B rocket body. The required Keplerian elements (SMA: 6621.14 km, ECC: 0.0012, INC: 41.47 deg) are verified against the setup_task.sh script and match the derived perigee/apogee altitudes. The required output file paths for the script and report exactly match the locations checked by export_result.sh.
